states.name: INITIALIZING
states.description: Storage and published interfaces are being prepared.

states.name: READY
states.description: The runtime accepts sessions, attachments, transfers, and dispatches.

states.name: ACTIVE
states.description: At least one intent dispatch is executing.

states.name: DEGRADED
states.description: The runtime is operating with a failed or degraded attachment transport.

states.name: DRAINING
states.description: New work is blocked while shutdown completes.

states.name: STOPPED
states.description: The runtime is not accepting or executing work.

states.name: ACTIVE
states.description: The session may load context and dispatch intents.

states.name: SUSPENDED
states.description: The session is durable but cannot mutate context, transfer, or dispatch.

states.name: CLOSED
states.description: The session cannot be resumed or dispatch new work.

states.name: ATTACHED
states.description: The manifest is valid and its transport is available.

states.name: DEGRADED
states.description: The manifest remains registered but transport failed.

states.name: DETACHED
states.description: The product is no longer routable.

states.name: ACCEPTED
states.description: The dispatch envelope is durably recorded.

states.name: COMPLETED
states.description: The adapter returned a valid response.

states.name: FAILED
states.description: The adapter failed and the failure was recorded.
